---
title: "Robust OED Published in SIAM SISC"
date: 2026-04-20
description: "Our paper [Robust OED for nonlinear inverse problems](https://doi.org/10.1137/24M1693921) has been published in SIAM SISC!"
---

Our paper [Robust OED for nonlinear inverse problems](https://doi.org/10.1137/24M1693921) has been published in SIAM SISC!
